title: DC has released a fresh trailer for its body horror movie 'Clayface' — and the Batman villain's first-ever solo film is going to make my skin crawl in the best way possible
summary: Nevertheless, there are myriad questions that the DCU Chapter One film's latest trailer, which arrived three months after Clayface 's first "super freaky" trailer , leaves unanswered. Clayface is the fifth DCU Chapter One project that'll see the light of day.
